members.member: API for referencing files related to a mod, such as save files.

member.name: M:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.Implementation.WukongInputApi.CanApplyInput
member.returns: true if keyboard input is not blocked by active text fields and menus.

members.member: Is the game currently in a gameplay level, as opposed to a menu or the like.
Shows a message on the player's screen, that persists until HideInfoMessage is called.
Shows a message on the player's screen. The message will automatically disappear after the given timeout.
Waits for the given task to complete in a synchronous manner.

member.name: T:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongChatApi
member.summary: API for interacting with the in-game chat.

member.name: M:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongChatApi.SendPlayerMessage(System.String)
member.summary: Sends a message to the in-game chat, as if the player wrote it.
member.param: The message to send.

member.name: M:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongChatApi.SendServerMessage(System.String)
member.summary: Sends a message to the in-game chat without a player name attached to it.
member.param: The message to send.

member.name: M:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongChatApi.ShowLocalMessage(System.String,UnrealEngine.Runtime.FLinearColor)
member.summary: Adds a message to the in-game chat, visible only to the local player.
member.param: The message to add to the chat.
The color of the message in the chat.

member.name: T:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongCheatsApi
member.summary: Provides methods and properties for enabling and managing cheats in the game.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongCheatsApi.CheatsAllowed
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether cheats are allowed.

member.name: M:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongCheatsApi.ToggleInfiniteMana
member.summary: Toggles infinite mana for the player.

member.name: M:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongCheatsApi.ResetCooldowns
member.summary: Resets all cooldowns for the player.

member.name: M:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongCheatsApi.ResetMana
member.summary: Resets the player's mana to its maximum value.

member.name: M:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongCheatsApi.SetSpritCooldownTime(System.Single)
member.summary: Sets the cooldown time for the player's spirit abilities.
member.param: The cooldown time to set, in seconds.

member.name: M:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongCheatsApi.ToggleInfiniteVessel
member.summary: Toggles infinite vessel usage for the player.

member.name: M:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongCheatsApi.ToggleInfiniteTransform
member.summary: Toggles infinite transformation for the player.

member.name: M:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongCheatsApi.ToggleNoSkillsCooldown
member.summary: Toggles no cooldowns for skills for the player.

member.name: T:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongConfigurationApi
member.summary: Provides ways to configure various aspects othe game's behavior. Will be replaced in the future with more specific configuration APIs, but for now serves as a catch-all for miscellaneous configuration options that don't fit anywhere else. Hence, we do not document the individual configuration options here, as they are all subject to change and may be removed in the future without a major version bump.

member.name: T:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongConsoleApi
member.summary: API for the in-game console (F1).

member.name: M:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongConsoleApi.AddCommand(System.String,ReadyM.Api.Command.ConsoleCommand,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String})
member.summary: Registers a command to the in-game console. The command will be available to all players in the session.
member.param: The name of the command that has to be typed in the console to execute the command.
Command handler
If specified, the console will show these as suggestions for the first parameter of the command. This is useful for commands that take a fixed set of parameters, such as "spawn wolf_sentinel".

member.name: M:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongConsoleApi.HasCommand(System.String)
member.summary: Checks if a command with the given name is already registered in the console.
member.param: Name of the command to check.
member.returns: true if a command with the given name is registered, false otherwise.

member.name: M:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongConsoleApi.LogMessage(System.String)
member.summary: Logs a message to the in-game console. This can be used to provide feedback to the player after executing a command, or to log important information that the player should see.
member.param: The message to log.

member.name: T:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongEventApi
member.summary: Provides events related to gameplay, player actions, and multiplayer interactions in Wukong Multiplayer.

member.name: E:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongEventApi.OnBeginPlayGameplayLevel
member.summary: Fired when the player enters a gameplay level.

member.name: E:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongEventApi.OnEndPlayGameplayLevel
member.summary: Fired when the player leaves a gameplay level, either by exiting to the main menu or by loading another level.

member.name: E:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongEventApi.OnLoadingScreenClose
member.summary: Fired when the loading screen is closed after loading a gameplay level.

member.name: E:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongEventApi.OnLevelLoaded
member.summary: Fired when a gameplay level is loaded, but before the loading screen is closed. This is a good event to use for initializing custom widgets, so that they are ready to be shown as soon as the loading screen is closed.

member.name: E:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongEventApi.OnExitLevel
member.summary: Fired when the player exits a level, either by exiting to the main menu or by loading another level.

member.name: E:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongEventApi.OnJoinedArea
member.summary: Fired when the player enters an area.

member.name: E:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongEventApi.OnLeftArea
member.summary: Fired when the player leaves an area.

member.name: E:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongEventApi.OnPlayerPawnSpawned
member.summary: Fired when the player's pawn (the in-game character they control) is spawned. This can happen when you enter a new area, or when another player connects to the game and their pawn is spawned for you.

member.name: E:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongEventApi.OnMainCharacterEntityInitialized
member.summary: Fired when the player's main character ECS entity is initialized and ready. This is fired before , so it can be used to set up things that need to be ready before the pawn is spawned.

member.name: E:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongEventApi.OnPlayerChangedTeam
member.summary: Fired when the player changes team, either by rebirthing or by joining a game in progress.

member.name: E:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongEventApi.OnLocalPlayerBeforeRebirth
member.summary: Fired when the local player's character is about to rebirth. This is fired before the rebirth actually happens, so the player's character will still be dead at this point.

member.name: E:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongEventApi.OnOtherPlayerInsideArea
member.summary: Fired when another player enters the same area as the local player.

member.name: E:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongEventApi.OnOtherPlayerOutsideArea
member.summary: Fired when another player leaves the area that the local player is in.

member.name: E:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongEventApi.OnConnected
member.summary: Fired when any player connects to the server.

member.name: E:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongEventApi.OnDisconnected
member.summary: Fired when any player disconnects from the server, either voluntarily or involuntarily.

member.name: E:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongEventApi.OnPlayerDead
member.summary: Fired when any player dies. The first parameter is the player character that died, and the second parameter is the entity that killed them (if applicable).

member.name: E:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongEventApi.OnMonsterDead
member.summary: Fired when any monster dies. The first parameter is the monster that died, and the second parameter is the entity that killed it (if applicable).

member.name: E:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongEventApi.OnMonsterDestroyed
member.summary: Fired when a monster is removed from the game world, either by dying or by being despawned for other reasons (e.g. the player leaving the area).

member.name: E:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongEventApi.OnLocalPlayerChangedSpectator
member.summary: Fired when the local player changes spectator mode, either by entering or exiting spectator mode.

member.name: E:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongEventApi.OnMonsterSpawned
member.summary: Fired when a monster is spawned in the game world, either by being spawned by the player or by being spawned by the game itself.

member.name: E:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongEventApi.OnLanguageChanged
member.summary: Fired when the game's language is changed, either by the player changing it in the settings or by the game automatically setting it based on the player's system language.

member.name: T:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongFileApi
member.summary: Provides methods related to manipulating files for Wukong mods, such as save files.

member.name: M:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongFileApi.GetModDirectory``1
member.summary: Get the absolute path to the mod's directory. Useful for finding files packaged with the mod.
member.typeparam: Pass the type of your mod's entry point. Used to find the mod's assembly and thus its directory.
member.returns: The absolute path to the mod's directory.

member.name: T:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongInputApi
member.summary: Provides methods related to input, such as registering key binds.

member.name: M:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongInputApi.RegisterKeyBind(CSharpModBase.Input.Key,System.Action)
member.summary: Registers a key bind with the specified key and action.
member.param: The key to bind.
The action to execute when the key is pressed.

member.name: M:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongInputApi.RegisterKeyBind(CSharpModBase.Input.ModifierKeys,CSharpModBase.Input.Key,System.Action)
member.summary: Registers a key bind with the specified modifier keys, key, and action.
member.param: The modifier keys (e.g., Ctrl, Alt, Shift).
The key to bind.
The action to execute when the key combination is pressed.

member.name: M:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongInputApi.RegisterGamePadBind(CSharpModBase.Input.GamePadButton,System.Action)
member.summary: Registers a gamepad button bind with the specified button and action.
member.param: The gamepad button to bind.
The action to execute when the button is pressed.

member.name: M:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongInputApi.CanApplyInput
member.summary: Determines whether keyboard input can currently be applied (i.e., not blocked by active text fields or menus).
member.returns: true if keyboard input is not blocked by active text fields and menus; otherwise, false.

member.name: T:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongLocalApi
member.summary: Provides various utility methods not related to networking.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongLocalApi.IsGameplayLevel
member.summary: Is the game currently in a gameplay level, as opposed to a menu or the like?

member.name: M:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongLocalApi.ShowInfoMessage(System.String)
member.summary: Shows a message on the player's screen.
member.param: The message to show.

member.name: M:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongLocalApi.ShowInfoMessage(System.String,System.Single)
member.summary: Shows a message on the player's screen for a certain amount of time.
member.param: The message to show.
The amount of time, in seconds, to show the message for.

member.name: M:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongLocalApi.HideInfoMessage
member.summary: Hides the message currently being shown on the player's screen, if any.

member.name: M:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongLocalApi.ShowTip(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Shows a tip message on the player's screen using the game's UI.
member.param: The message to show.
Whether the message should automatically hide after 5 seconds

member.name: M:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongLocalApi.Wait(System.Threading.Tasks.Task)
member.summary: Waits for the given task to complete in a synchronous manner.
member.param: The task to wait for.

member.name: T:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongPvpApi
member.summary: API for PvP mode. Will be removed in the future when custom data sync and server-side scripting are implemented.

member.name: T:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongSynchronizationApi
member.summary: Provides methods related to synchronizing game state between players in a multiplayer session.

member.name: M:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongSynchronizationApi.GetDisconnectReasonAndInvoke(System.Action{LiteNetLib.DisconnectReason})
member.summary: Retrieves the disconnect reason and invokes the provided callback with it.
member.param: The callback to invoke with the disconnect reason.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongSynchronizationApi.InArea
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the player is in an area.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongSynchronizationApi.IsConnected
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the player is connected to the server.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongSynchronizationApi.IsMasterClient
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the player is the master client in an area.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongSynchronizationApi.LocalPlayerId
member.summary: Gets the local player's ID.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongSynchronizationApi.CurrentAreaId
member.summary: Gets the current area ID.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongSynchronizationApi.LocalMainCharacter
member.summary: Gets the local main character.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongSynchronizationApi.AllPlayers
member.summary: Gets a list of all players on the server.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongSynchronizationApi.AreaPlayers
member.summary: Gets a list of players in the current area.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongSynchronizationApi.AllTamers
member.summary: Gets a list of all tamers (monsters).

member.name: P:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongSynchronizationApi.AreaTamers
member.summary: Gets a list of tamers (monsters) in the current area.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongSynchronizationApi.AllMainCharacters
member.summary: Gets a list of all main characters.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongSynchronizationApi.AreaMainCharacters
member.summary: Gets a list of main characters in the current area.

member.name: M:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongSynchronizationApi.GetPlayerEntityByActor(UnrealEngine.Engine.AActor)
member.summary: Gets the player entity associated with the specified actor.
member.param: The actor to find the player entity for.
member.returns: The player entity, or null if not found.

member.name: M:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongSynchronizationApi.GetPlayerEntityByLastTransformation(b1.BGUCharacterCS)
member.summary: Gets the player entity associated with the last transformation of the specified character.
member.param: The character to find the player entity for.
member.returns: The player entity, or null if not found.

member.name: M:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongSynchronizationApi.TryGetPlayerInfoById(ReadyM.Api.Idents.PlayerId,System.String@,System.Nullable{System.Int32}@)
member.summary: Tries to get player information by ID.
member.param: The player ID.
The player's nickname, if found.
The player's team ID, if found.
member.returns: true if the player information was found; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongSynchronizationApi.GetMainCharacterByPlayerId(ReadyM.Api.Idents.PlayerId)
member.summary: Gets the main character associated with the specified player ID.
member.param: The player ID.
member.returns: The main character, or null if not found.

member.name: M:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongSynchronizationApi.SyncMonstersInArea
member.summary: Register all monsters in the current area to be synchronized over the network. This should be called whenever the first player enters a new area.

member.name: M:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongSynchronizationApi.SpawnEnemy(WukongMp.Api.Configuration.TamerKind,System.Numerics.Vector3,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Spawns an enemy of the specified kind at the given position.
member.param: The kind of enemy to spawn.
The position to spawn the enemy at.
The number of enemies to spawn. Defaults to 1.
The team ID for the spawned enemies. Defaults to the default monster team ID (2).

member.name: M:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongSynchronizationApi.EnableSpectatorMode(WukongMp.Sdk.Entities.ReadyMainCharacter,ReadyM.Wukong.Common.ECS.Values.SpectatorReason)
member.summary: Enables spectator mode for the specified character.
member.param: The character to enable spectator mode for.
The reason for enabling spectator mode.

member.name: M:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongSynchronizationApi.DisableSpectatorMode(WukongMp.Sdk.Entities.ReadyMainCharacter)
member.summary: Disables spectator mode for the specified character.
member.param: The character to disable spectator mode for.

member.name: T:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongWidgetApi
member.summary: Provides methods related to in-game widgets, such as chat messages, info messages, tips, and timers.

member.name: M:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongWidgetApi.ToggleCommandVisibility
member.summary: Toggles the visibility of the command console.

member.name: M:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongWidgetApi.AddMessageToConsole(System.String)
member.summary: Adds a message to the in-game console.
member.param: The message to add to the console.

member.name: M:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongWidgetApi.ShowInGameWidgets(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Shows or hides in-game widgets based on whether the player is on the gameplay level.
member.param: Indicates whether the player is on a gameplay level.

member.name: M:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongWidgetApi.ShowInfoMessage(System.String)
member.summary: Displays an informational message on the screen.
member.param: The informational message to display.

member.name: M:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongWidgetApi.HideInfoMessage
member.summary: Hides the currently displayed informational message.

member.name: M:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongWidgetApi.ShowTip(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Displays a tip on the screen using the game UI tip widget.
member.param: The tip to display.
Indicates whether the tip should automatically hide after a duration.

member.name: M:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongWidgetApi.HideTip
member.summary: Hides the currently displayed tip.

member.name: M:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongWidgetApi.SetCountdownVisibility(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Sets the visibility of the countdown timer widget.
member.param: Indicates whether the countdown timer should be visible.

member.name: M:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.IWukongWidgetApi.SetCountdownText(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Sets the value of the countdown timer widget.
member.param: The initial minutes to display on the countdown timer.
The initial seconds to display on the countdown timer.

member.name: T:WukongMp.Sdk.Api.WukongApi
member.summary: The main entry point for accessing Wukong's API. Provides access to all of the various APIs and services that WukongMP offers.

members.member: A ReadyActor is an entity that has a mapped Pawn.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Sdk.Entities.ReadyObjectExtensions.<G>$6195CECABC7C3BD151705E592B8D91C0`1.Owner
member.summary: Gets the owner of the entity. This is usually the player that spawned the entity, or a player that was handled the ownership after the original owner disconnected.

member.name: T:WukongMp.Sdk.ModBase
member.summary: Base class for WukongMP SDK mods. Each mod should have exactly one class extending from this, which will be instantiated by the mod loader.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Sdk.ModBase.Name
member.summary: Mod name, used for logging and patching.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Sdk.ModBase.IsDebug
member.summary: Indicates whether the mod is running in a debug build. Can be used to enable debug-only features or logging.

member.name: M:WukongMp.Sdk.ModBase.Init
member.summary: Called by the mod loader on game start.

member.name: M:WukongMp.Sdk.ModBase.LateInit
member.summary: Called by the mod loader after all Init calls.

member.name: M:WukongMp.Sdk.ModBase.DeInit
member.summary: Called by the mod loader on game closing.

member.name: M:WukongMp.Sdk.ModBase.SetLoggerFactory(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILoggerFactory)
member.summary: Called by the mod loader.

member.name: M:WukongMp.Sdk.ModBase.GetReloadContext
member.summary: Called by the mod loader. Used in hot reload.

member.name: M:WukongMp.Sdk.ModBase.Reload(System.Object)
member.summary: Called by the mod loader. Used in hot reload.

members.member: Base class for plugin systems. Adds itself to the update loop on creation and removes itself on disposal.

member.name: F:WukongMp.Sdk.ModSystemBase.UpdateTick.deltaTime
member.summary: The time in seconds since the last tick.

member.name: F:WukongMp.Sdk.ModSystemBase.UpdateTick.time
member.summary: The time at the beginning of the current frame since application start.

member.name: T:WukongMp.Sdk.SaveFileType
member.summary: Indicates the type of a save file.

member.name: F:WukongMp.Sdk.SaveFileType.WorldSave
member.summary: Indicates a world save file, which contains the state of the world.

member.name: F:WukongMp.Sdk.SaveFileType.PlayerSave
member.summary: Indicates a player save file, which contains the equipment, inventory, skills, and other data related to a player.
